description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single deploy stage containing a pages job. The pages job runs on the default Docker image, executes the script commands: mkdir .public, cp -r * .public, mv .public public, and then finds all files in public matching extensions htm, html, txt, text, js, css, svg, scss, png and compresses them with gzip -9 -f -kvr. It publishes the public directory as an artifact and is limited to the master branch. No services, caches, or extra variables are defined.
